title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Lulu Hypermarket India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Lulu Hypermarket India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
